'''Skannbult Likker''', also called '''Fire Liquor''' on [[Elshandruu Pica]], was considered to be one of the most volatile [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicants]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It originated from [[Skann]] in the [[Astal sector/Legends|Astal sector]], distilled in rock basins by local farmers from that [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surplus of [[Dust-Corn]] and [[Dry Gene Wheat]]. Good quality Likker was rare even on its planet of origin, primarily distilled on smaller rural farms; most traders only encountered an inferior quality Likker found in Skann's [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]' bar. [[Kina Margath]] acquired a small supply of quality Skannbult Likker for [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica|her establishment]], where a double measure went for as much as twenty-five [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="GG9" />
